text: {"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"1","subject":"Explore current executors and job system","description":"Read and summarize all executor files (coding-agent.ts, branding-agent.ts, integration-agent.ts, planning-agent.ts, testing-agent.ts, ui-agent.ts), job-manager.ts, execute.ts route, and useJobStream.ts hook. Produce a detailed summary of what each does, what system prompt logic they contain, how they use Claude SDK, how SSE streaming works, and what needs to be ported to the engine.","assignedBy":"team-lead","timestamp":"2026-03-06T21:07:11.543Z"}
